entry.title: 20 Car Stickers
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 75.00

Premium high-definition wall poster of Stickerized Combo Pack – Auto Lovers Edition (20 Pieces), designed to instantly upgrade the aesthetic of your room.

Printed on ultra-thick 300 GSM matte photo paper for rich colours, sharp detailing and a soft anti-glare finish. Long-lasting, fade-resistant and crafted to give your wall a clean, premium look with zero effort.

This poster blends perfectly into bedroom, living room, gaming setup or workspace décor. Easy to frame, perfect for collage walls, and ideal for anyone who loves aesthetic room vibes, minimal design and high-quality prints.

A great pick for personal use or gifting — made to match your vibe and elevate your space.

entry.title: Funny Aesthetic Sticker #01 | Stickerized | 10 Stickers
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 99.00

A mix of funny, sarcastic, and aesthetic stickers designed to match your mood, personality, and everyday vibe.

From witty quotes to relatable humor and minimal illustrations — this sticker pack is perfect for customizing your space and gadgets.


Design Highlights:

  • Combination of funny, motivational & sarcastic quotes
  • Clean aesthetic with modern minimal artwork
  • Relatable designs for everyday mood & personality
  • Perfect mix of humor + creativity

Product Details:

  • High-quality print with sharp detailing
  • Durable and lightweight
  • Easy to apply on flat surfaces
  • Suitable for laptops, phones, journals, desks & more

Perfect For:

  • Laptop & phone customization
  • Journals, notebooks & planners
  • Gift packs & personal collections
  • Aesthetic desk setups

Note: Slight color variation may occur due to lighting and screen differences.

entry.title: Glue Dots 100 Clear Adhesive Dots | Double Sided Mounting Stickers
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 39.00

Mount your posters instantly—no nails, no tape, and no wall damage.

Our Clear Glue Dots (100 pcs) give you a strong, clean, hassle-free way to stick posters, photos, mini prints, bookmarks, and other lightweight decor.

Note: Quantity refers to the number of glue dots (not sheet count). You will receive 100 usable glue dots.

✨ Why You’ll Love It

• 100 clear adhesive dots (double-sided)
• Strong hold for lightweight items
• Easy peel & stick application
• Removes cleanly (no wall damage)
• No sticky residue
• Transparent finish (almost invisible)

📦 What You Get

100 glue dots
(Pre-cut on backing sheet for easy use)

📌 Best For

  • Wall posters
  • Photo collages
  • Mini prints
  • Study/desk setups
  • College dorm decor
  • Temporary decorations

Strong hold. Clean look. Zero wall damage.

entry.title: Hawkins Universe Aesthetic Sticker Pack (20 Pieces) | Stickerized
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 149.00

This 20-piece mixed sticker set brings together the entire Hawkins universe — from cute chibi characters to dark Upside Down designs. Featuring iconic scenes, quotes, symbols, creatures and aesthetic artwork, this collection is perfect for anyone who loves a blend of cute and creepy.

Printed on premium waterproof vinyl, each sticker has sharp detailing, vibrant colours and a smooth matte finish. They are durable, long-lasting and perfect for laptops, phones, bottles, diaries, notebooks or room décor.

With 20 unique designs capturing friendship moments, eerie forests, spooky lab entrances, club emblems and fun retro elements, this pack is an ideal choice for fans, collectors and aesthetic sticker lovers.

entry.title: Red & Black Hawkins Universe | Stranger Things #01 | Stickerized | 10 Stickers
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 99.00

Step into the eerie world of the Upside Down with this 10-piece dark aesthetic sticker set. Featuring glowing red silhouettes, creepy clocks, Hawkins Laboratory, shadow creatures, and iconic horror elements, this pack perfectly captures the mysterious and unsettling energy of the Hawkins universe.

Printed on high-quality waterproof vinyl, each sticker features sharp detailing, rich colours and a premium matte finish. These durable, long-lasting stickers are perfect for laptops, phones, notebooks, bottles or adding a spooky touch to room décor.

This pack includes 10 unique horror-inspired designs, making it an ideal choice for fans of dark art, supernatural themes and the chilling side of the Hawkins world.

entry.title: Friends Don’t Lie | Stranger Things #01 | Stickerized | 10 Stickers
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 99.00

Add a touch of cute retro Hawkins energy to your space with this 10-piece chibi sticker set. This pack includes adorable character designs, iconic scenes, and aesthetic elements inspired by the show's unforgettable moments.

Printed on high-quality waterproof vinyl, these stickers feature vibrant colours, clean outlines and a premium matte finish. Durable, long-lasting, and perfect for laptops, phones, bottles, notebooks, diaries or room décor.

With 10 unique chibi-style designs including friendship moments, bikes, quotes, and club-themed artwork, this set is perfect for fans, collectors, and anyone who loves aesthetic stickers with a nostalgic vibe.

entry.title: Hawkins Upside Down | Stranger Things #01 | Stickerized | 5 Stickers
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 49.00

Bring the iconic dark Hawkins atmosphere to your space with this 5-piece red-and-black aesthetic sticker set. Each design captures the eerie Upside Down vibe with glowing reds, shadow silhouettes and haunting visual details.

Printed on premium waterproof vinyl, these stickers are durable, fade-resistant and perfect for laptops, phones, bottles, notebooks or horror-themed room décor.

This pack includes 5 unique designs featuring creepy clocks, shadow creatures, eerie forests and glowing silhouettes — perfect for collectors, fans of dark aesthetics, and anyone who loves horror-inspired artwork.

entry.title: Welcome to Hawkins | Stranger Things #01 | Stickerized | 5 Stickers
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 49.00

Bring the nostalgic Hawkins vibe to your space with this cute 5-piece chibi sticker set. Each sticker is crafted with vibrant colours, clean outlines and an aesthetic finish inspired by your favourite retro adventure world.

Printed on premium waterproof vinyl, these stickers are durable, fade-resistant and perfect for decorating laptops, phones, bottles, notebooks or gifting someone who loves aesthetic room vibes.

This pack includes 5 unique chibi-style designs featuring iconic scenes and elements from the Hawkins universe — a perfect mix for collectors, fans and anyone who enjoys cute minimal artwork.
